category_sources: Official GitHub README describes openfortivpn as a client for PPP+TLS VPN tunnel services compatible with Fortinet VPNs.
source_facts.description: Open Fortinet client for PPP+TLS VPN tunnel services
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses openfortivpn.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage, examples, configuration, install, SAML, and build information.
Official GitHub repository exposes a Wiki tab for additional project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/adrienverge/openfortivpn, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents VPN connection examples, SAML login, configuration files, and pppd behavior.
source_facts.description mentions Fortinet, PPP+TLS VPN tunnel services.
